title: WISeKey, SEALSQ set up Quantisimo SPV for $575M merger deal
content:
* WISeKey International (WKEY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WKEY]) and its subsidiary SEALSQ (LAES [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LAES]) Thursday announced that their jointly established special purpose vehicle, Quantisimo Corp, has entered into a non-binding LOI with GigCapital8 (GIW [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GIW]) to explore the establishment of a Nasdaq-listed strategic quantum technology platform.
 	* The proposed transaction [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20563350-wisekey-and-sealsq-establish-quantisimo-corp-as-a-special-purpose-vehicle-and-execute-letter]contemplates a business combination between Quantisimo and GigCapital8. 
 	* Upon completion of the transaction, the combined company is expected to have a pre-money enterprise value of approximately $575M, subject to customary closing conditions. The parties intend to increase this initial valuation to reach $2B through build-up consolidated acquisitions of up to an additional five quantum companies.
 	* The transaction is currently expected to close during the first quarter of 2027.
 	* Quantisimo was created by WISeKey and SEALSQ to establish a Trusted Quantum Pure-Play platform designed to provide investors with direct exposure to the rapidly emerging quantum economy. 
 	* SEALSQ (LAES [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LAES]) is up 2.2% premarket.
